description: Composition Black trousers made of 65% polyester, 32% viscose and 3% lycra with a zipper and button closure on the waistband, belt loops on the waistband, two insert pockets on the front, two patch pockets at the back and a flat front Fit Low waist; Slim fit Wash care Machine or hand wash separately Use mild detergent only Do not bleach or wring Dry in shade Medium iron Stylish casual trousers for women with a low waist and slim fit, from scullers. Wear these with feminine shirts, tucked in or out, with a slim belt. Style this with a shoulder strap handbag and closed toe pumps. Model statistics The product is a size 28 on a model of height 5'8” waist 26” and hips 36”
